mapper.insert: insert into lego_kb_documents (id, collection_id, title, body, body_rich, status, error_message, metadata, linked_tool_ids, tool_output_bindings, similar_queries, created_at, updated_at) values (#{id}, #{collectionId}, #{title}, #{body}, #{bodyRich,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'PENDING', null, '{}'::jsonb, CAST(#{linkedToolIdsJson} AS jsonb), CAST(#{toolOutputBindingsJson} AS jsonb), CAST(#{similarQueriesJson} AS jsonb), #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: update lego_kb_documents set status = #{status}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}

update lego_kb_documents set title = #{title}, body = #{body}, body_rich = #{bodyRich,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, linked_tool_ids = CAST(#{linkedToolIdsJson} AS jsonb), tool_output_bindings = CAST(#{toolOutputBindingsJson} AS jsonb), similar_queries = CAST(#{similarQueriesJson} AS jsonb), status = 'PENDING', error_message = null, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select id, collection_id, title, body, body_rich, status, error_message, linked_tool_ids::text as linked_tool_ids_json, tool_output_bindings::text as tool_output_bindings_json, similar_queries::text as similar_queries_json, created_at, updated_at from lego_kb_documents where id = #{id}

select id, collection_id, title, body, body_rich, status, error_message, linked_tool_ids::text as linked_tool_ids_json, tool_output_bindings::text as tool_output_bindings_json, similar_queries::text as similar_queries_json, created_at, updated_at from lego_kb_documents where id in #{id}

select id, collection_id, title, body, body_rich, status, error_message, linked_tool_ids::text as linked_tool_ids_json, tool_output_bindings::text as tool_output_bindings_json, similar_queries::text as similar_queries_json, created_at, updated_at from lego_kb_documents where collection_id = #{collectionId} order by created_at desc
